news.title: Complete pending stations on Pune metro line III, meet March 2026 deadline: CM to PMRDA
news.para: Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis has directed PMRDA to expedite work on the pending 13 stations of the Hinjewadi–Shivajinagar Metro Line 3, aiming for a March 2026 completion. While 90% of the work is done, IT industry representatives are pushing for a phased opening to provide immediate commuter relief.

news.title: Over 160 illegal PGs found in Bengaluru east, civic body mandates compliance by Nov 5
news.para: Bengaluru East city corporation has launched a crackdown on 165 unlicensed paying guest accommodations, issuing a seven-day ultimatum for owners to obtain trade licenses and comply with safety norms. Violations include operating in residential zones, lacking fire safety, poor hygiene, and no CCTV. A new certification system is proposed to ensure regulated and safe PG accommodations for residents.

news.title: Ghaziabad development body to draft a master plan for 61 villages near expressways
news.para: Ghaziabad Development Authority (GDA) will create a separate master plan for 61 villages along the Delhi Meerut Expressway and Eastern Peripheral Expressway to regulate growth. These villages, previously governed by gram panchayats, are experiencing exponential and unregulated development due to the expressways.
